title: RFA Applauds President TrumpГўв‚¬в„ўs Call for Congressional Action on Year-Round E15
content:
The Renewable Fuels Association applauded President Trump for strongly reaffirming his support for AmericaГўв‚¬в„ўs ethanol industry and calling on Congress to send a bill approving year-round E15 Гўв‚¬Е“to my desk very quickly.Гўв‚¬Вќ Trump said he would sign the bill into law Гўв‚¬Е“without delay.Гўв‚¬Вќ
Гўв‚¬Е“I promised to support E15 all year-round,Гўв‚¬Вќ Trump told the crowd in Des Moines, Iowa, today. Гўв‚¬Е“I am trusting Speaker Johnson and Leader Thune to find a deal that worksГўв‚¬вЂќweГўв‚¬в„ўve got itГўв‚¬вЂќfor farmers, consumers, and refinersГўв‚¬В¦to get E15 approved. And they are working on it and they are very close to getting it done. And [theyГўв‚¬в„ўll] be sending me a bill very shortly supporting year-round E15, to my desk very quickly, and I will sign it without delay.Гўв‚¬Вќ
In response to the PresidentГўв‚¬в„ўs remarks, RFA President and CEO Geoff Cooper stated, Гўв‚¬Е“President Trump has always been a strong supporter of E15 because he knows just how important it is to farmers and to consumers looking for lower prices at the pump. He understands that the quickest and surest way to boost the farm economy is to open a vast new market opportunity for grain-based ethanol. We are grateful to President Trump for again voicing his support and calling on Congress to get year-round E15 legislation passed and to his desk immediately.Гўв‚¬Вќ
Cooper also praised the Iowa House delegation for its relentless E15 advocacy on behalf of the nationГўв‚¬в„ўs farmers and ethanol producers. Гўв‚¬Е“Representatives Feenstra, Hinson, Miller-Meeks, and Nunn should be commended for their tireless efforts to remove red-tape regulatory barriers and secure year-round market access for lower-cost, cleaner-burning E15.Гўв‚¬Вќ
author: Analysts Account
